title: DND's Mods n Stuff
description: It adds some mods and resource packs that I commonly use while playing Minecraft.
body:
This modpack adds almost every mod, resource pack and shader I play with in Minecraft. I made this with no intention except for making a modpack that doesn't add insane features like new structures etc.

It includes things like 3D Block Resource Packs, Sodium and Complimentary Reimagined.

**Hope you get it! :)**
